title: taraxacum cuneatum
intro: Taraxacum cuneatum, also known as the wedge-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it a potential remedy for treating liver and kidney issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum cuneatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum cuneatum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a raw ingredient in salads and other culinary dishes.
